proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher values of `feature_041` are associated with higher `pfs_months` in a univariable linear regression.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable slope for feature_041 was 0.1699 months per unit (r=0.7571), p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher values of `feature_036` are associated with lower `pfs_months` in a univariable linear regression.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable slope for feature_036 was -1.0992 months per unit (r=-0.3339), p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with the other value of `feature_001`.

analyses.code: Welch test: mean(pfs_months | feature_001=1) - mean(pfs_months | feature_001!=1)
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.925 for feature_001=1 (n=32365) vs 4.362 otherwise (n=17635); difference=-1.438 months, p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_042` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with the other value of `feature_042`.

analyses.code: Welch test: mean(pfs_months | feature_042=1) - mean(pfs_months | feature_042!=1)
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.743 for feature_042=1 (n=12584) vs 3.663 otherwise (n=37416); difference=-0.921 months, p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015` equal to "adenocarcinoma" have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with other `feature_015` levels.

analyses.code: Welch test: mean(pfs_months | feature_015="adenocarcinoma") - mean(pfs_months | other levels)
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.67 for feature_015="adenocarcinoma" (n=36099) vs 2.813 otherwise (n=13901); difference=0.857 months, p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015` equal to "squamous" have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with other `feature_015` levels.

analyses.code: Welch test: mean(pfs_months | feature_015="squamous") - mean(pfs_months | other levels)
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.813 for feature_015="squamous" (n=13901) vs 3.67 otherwise (n=36099); difference=-0.857 months, p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_025` equal to "current" have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with other `feature_025` levels.

analyses.code: Welch test: mean(pfs_months | feature_025="current") - mean(pfs_months | other levels)
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.987 for feature_025="current" (n=14974) vs 3.621 otherwise (n=35026); difference=-0.634 months, p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher values of `feature_004` are associated with lower `pfs_months` in a univariable linear regression.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable slope for feature_004 was -0.0733 months per unit (r=-0.127), p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest observed main-effect covariates, `feature_041` retains a positive independent association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_001 + feature_042 + feature_010 + feature_057 + feature_009 + feature_037 + feature_028 + feature_066 + feature_031 + feature_005 + feature_041_z + feature_036_z + feature_004_z + feature_056_z + feature_051_z + feature_013_z + feature_073_z + feature_014_z
analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted OLS model including 10 binary and 8 numeric high-signal features, the coefficient for feature_041 was 1.682 months (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest observed main-effect covariates, `feature_036` retains a negative independent association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_001 + feature_042 + feature_010 + feature_057 + feature_009 + feature_037 + feature_028 + feature_066 + feature_031 + feature_005 + feature_041_z + feature_036_z + feature_004_z + feature_056_z + feature_051_z + feature_013_z + feature_073_z + feature_014_z
analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted OLS model including 10 binary and 8 numeric high-signal features, the coefficient for feature_036 was -0.745 months (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest observed main-effect covariates, `feature_001` retains a negative independent association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_001 + feature_042 + feature_010 + feature_057 + feature_009 + feature_037 + feature_028 + feature_066 + feature_031 + feature_005 + feature_041_z + feature_036_z + feature_004_z + feature_056_z + feature_051_z + feature_013_z + feature_073_z + feature_014_z
analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted OLS model including 10 binary and 8 numeric high-signal features, the coefficient for feature_001 was -1.423 months (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest observed main-effect covariates, `feature_042` retains a negative independent association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_001 + feature_042 + feature_010 + feature_057 + feature_009 + feature_037 + feature_028 + feature_066 + feature_031 + feature_005 + feature_041_z + feature_036_z + feature_004_z + feature_056_z + feature_051_z + feature_013_z + feature_073_z + feature_014_z
analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted OLS model including 10 binary and 8 numeric high-signal features, the coefficient for feature_042 was -0.911 months (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of `feature_010` and `feature_009` changes `pfs_months` beyond the sum of their individual main effects; the interaction term is positive.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction coefficient for feature_010:feature_009 was 2.558 months (p=<1e-16); cell means both=5.766 (n=2246), feature_010 only=3.213 (n=4122), feature_009 only=3.329 (n=15298), neither=3.334 (n=28334).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of `feature_010` and `feature_037` changes `pfs_months` beyond the sum of their individual main effects; the interaction term is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction coefficient for feature_010:feature_037 was -1.694 months (p=<1e-16); cell means both=3.186 (n=2860), feature_010 only=4.87 (n=3508), feature_037 only=3.338 (n=19511), neither=3.327 (n=24121).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of `feature_009` and `feature_037` changes `pfs_months` beyond the sum of their individual main effects; the interaction term is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction coefficient for feature_009:feature_037 was -0.562 months (p=<1e-16); cell means both=3.324 (n=7768), feature_009 only=3.892 (n=9776), feature_037 only=3.316 (n=14603), neither=3.321 (n=17853).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of `feature_010` and `feature_057` changes `pfs_months` beyond the sum of their individual main effects; the interaction term is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction coefficient for feature_010:feature_057 was -1.21 months (p=8.88e-16); cell means both=2.316 (n=259), feature_010 only=4.19 (n=6109), feature_057 only=2.702 (n=2205), neither=3.366 (n=41427).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of `feature_057` and `feature_009` changes `pfs_months` beyond the sum of their individual main effects; the interaction term is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction coefficient for feature_057:feature_009 was -0.488 months (p=4.13e-7); cell means both=2.568 (n=855), feature_057 only=2.711 (n=1609), feature_009 only=3.696 (n=16689), neither=3.35 (n=30847).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of `feature_010` and `feature_029` changes `pfs_months` beyond the sum of their individual main effects; the interaction term is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction coefficient for feature_010:feature_029 was -0.817 months (p=1.35e-6); cell means both=3.307 (n=191), feature_010 only=4.139 (n=6177), feature_029 only=3.318 (n=1328), neither=3.332 (n=42304).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between higher `feature_041` and `pfs_months` differs by `feature_001`; the standardized interaction term is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS coefficient for standardized feature_041 x feature_001 was -0.126 months (p=<1e-16), after including both lower-order terms.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between higher `feature_041` and `pfs_months` differs by `feature_042`; the standardized interaction term is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS coefficient for standardized feature_041 x feature_042 was -0.113 months (p=1.11e-15), after including both lower-order terms.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between higher `feature_036` and `pfs_months` differs by `feature_001`; the standardized interaction term is positive.

analyses.result_summary: OLS coefficient for standardized feature_036 x feature_001 was 0.075 months (p=8.05e-5), after including both lower-order terms.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest univariable main effect, `feature_041`, remains significant after a Bonferroni correction over all screened main-effect tests.

analyses.result_summary: The raw p-value for feature_041 was <1e-16; Bonferroni-adjusted over 76 screened main-effect contrasts, p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest binary-binary interaction, `feature_010` by `feature_009`, remains significant after Bonferroni correction over screened binary-binary interactions.

analyses.result_summary: The raw interaction p-value for feature_010:feature_009 was <1e-16; Bonferroni-adjusted over 703 screened binary-binary interactions, p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The main-effect direction for `feature_041` is consistent within strata of `feature_010`.

analyses.code: Stratified test of feature_041 within feature_010=0
analyses.result_summary: Within feature_010=0, feature_041 effect was 0.169 months (n=43632, p=<1e-16).

analyses.code: Stratified test of feature_041 within feature_010=1
analyses.result_summary: Within feature_010=1, feature_041 effect was 0.176 months (n=6368, p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A simple count score composed of the top adverse features (`feature_036`, `feature_001`, `feature_042`) is negatively associated with `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Each additional adverse-feature indicator in the feature_036, feature_001, feature_042 score was associated with -1.274 months of pfs_months (p=<1e-16). Mean score=1.548.
